title: チャンピオンズCの後に・相剋な2人

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Dui, Zhen, Gen... no—Xun! Fortune lies in the
southeast!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If I can just see the path, my doubts will
disappear! It doesn't matter how strong my
opponents are!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WHOAAAA?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yes! That's what I'm talking about! Did you see
that?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
This is how I run! ♪ Even against senior year
runners, I won't budge an inch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey puts on a magnificent
performance, proving her youthful talent in the
central dirt G1 race.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
How was it, Trainer? That was probably my best
run this year, right?
choice_data_list: Yeah! Fate was on your side!
Yeah! Fate was on your side!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You said it! ☆ I almost felt like the wave of dust
behind me was pushing me forward!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
All right! If I can keep this up, I'll only get even
better next year!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: ...Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Oh, Tarumae! And Acute, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae and Wonder Acute come over
together.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for today! ☆ Our energies must be in sync,
because I felt super fired up!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae, what did you think of my running? Do
you think I'll be able to do well next year?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Your running was...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, you'll do well. I do think you'll do well,
but...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: It's a shame... isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Huh? What is?

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, Tarumae?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae's eyes are awash with a sorrowful
glow.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I pushed through blood, sweat, and tears,
working as hard as I could. Only now am I finally
able to run like this...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I moved forward in my own way while keeping my
feet on the ground. But, your path was... a little
different, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
You spent so much time on things that aren't
directly related to racing...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It's really impressive that you've come this far
despite that, but I wish that you'd used your own
time a little more wisely!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
If you'd invested as much into training as you did
into feng shui, your running would be even more
incredible. You've got so much potential!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: If you took racing seriously—really seriously, then you'd be able to achieve anything.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to compete against the Rickey who gave
it her all every step of the way.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Taru...mae...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her words were like rough ocean waves. Although
her voice was gentle, it harbored an undercurrent
of anger.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: Ah, don't get so worked up, Tarumae.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae... That's not how it is. I haven't just been
messing around all this time!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I mean, sure, I did a lot of TV stuff, and I got
really close to ruining my own consistency...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: But that's just my way of doing things!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae doesn't respond. Instead, she
stands there with her lips tightly pursed, clearly
frustrated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Both of them stay silent. Even Wonder Acute
doesn't say a word.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Okay, you two. That's enough of that! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You can't be acting like this at the end of such an
exciting race.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Falco...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Umadols in particular need to remember the
importance of smiling. Right?

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: You're right... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
It's just that... things like feng shui... They've
never helped me before.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hokko Tarumae gives a quick bow of apology
and leaves. It's obvious that she had no ill
intentions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Trainer... I don't think I'm strange.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I just want to use feng shui to make everyone
happier. And that includes Tarumae, too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But maybe others don't see it that way. Maybe
they just think I'm goofing around.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I understand both sides of it. But...
choice_data_list: I think your dream might just be too big.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Too big?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Look at Tarumae. She tries her best for
those close to her.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: So maybe she can't quite get your dream of wanting to make everyone happy with feng shui.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
It might not seem like it, but she's been through a
lot. She's seen firsthand in the regionals how
relying on things like luck just doesn't cut it
sometimes.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But you know what? She's taken some detours of
her own too. That's what her singing and dancing
practice as an Umadol are, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I think she'll come around, eventually. Don't
let it get to you, Rickey.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That evening...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Trainer. I think my running got through to
Tarumae and Acute today. But...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I don't think I can say the same about my feelings.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This wasn't what I wanted. Not at all.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae's love for her hometown. My desire to
help people with feng shui. We poured those
feelings into our race, and they clashed head-on.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I wanted us to compete, acknowledge each other,
and then finally connect. That's the kind of race I
wanted to run.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: One more time, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: I couldn't pull it off today, so I want another shot!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So I'm counting on you to point me the right way.
Where's my next race?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're looking for a chance to run against Hokko
Tarumae again, so we need to consider what she's
aiming for.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today was one of the two main central G1 dirt
races. The other one would be...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The February Stakes... A race just as big as
today's.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: That's it, then! That's our next goal!
choice_data_list: You don't need to check it with feng shui?
You don't need to check it with feng shui?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's fine. I want to give it a try, regardless of my
fortune. I have to.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: This time, I'm sure I'll get Tarumae to understand!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey gives herself a morale boost as we
aim for the February Stakes. Only time will tell if
her words will prove true.
